executives.name: Jack Fusco
executives.background: Mr. Fusco has served as President and Chief Executive Officer since May 2016. He is also a director of Cheniere. Prior to joining Cheniere, he served as CEO of Calpine Corporation from 2008 to 2014 and as Executive Chairman from 2014 to 2016.
